response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy depth, or the 15-year technical leadership trajectory required for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and public contributions to developer tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience beyond minor AI-agent tooling
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks explicit 15-year engineering timeline verification
Limited visibility into leadership impact at director level or strategic customer advisory experience
